task_completion.description: Select Dive #3 in the dive list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dive #3 should be visibly highlighted or selected in the main dive list of the Subsurface application.

task_completion.description: Open the Export dialog in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog window should be open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Select CSV as the export format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Export dialog, the 'CSV' option (or 'CSV file') must be selected as the output format.

task_completion.description: Configure the export to include only profile data for the selected dive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Export dialog, options for 'Profile' or 'Profile data' (time, depth, temperature) must be checked, and the export scope must be set to 'Selected dives' (not 'All dives'). Other data types like 'Dive details' should ideally be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Set the output filename to dive3_profile.csv in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog should show the destination directory as '/home/ga/Documents' (or just 'Documents') and the filename as 'dive3_profile.csv'.

task_completion.description: Confirm the successful export of the CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog is confirmed (e.g., clicking 'Save'), or a file manager/terminal window shows 'dive3_profile.csv' successfully created in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the Subsurface GUI to perform the export.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Subsurface application's Export menus and dialogs, rather than terminal commands (like sqlite3 or python scripts) extracting the data.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual dive log software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Subsurface application window should be visible with the loaded dive data, proving the agent didn't just create a mock file.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type the CSV contents.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) open where the agent is manually typing out time, depth, and temperature waypoints.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is strictly '/home/ga/Documents/dive3_profile.csv'. The target dive is Dive 3. The export must be restricted to 'Selected dives' to ensure only Dive 3 is exported, and the exported data must be CSV format containing raw profile waypoints.
